command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, json, os
checks=[]
# gh auth status can include host/user only; capture exit code and redact generously.
try:
    p=subprocess.run(['gh','auth','status'], text=True, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE, timeout=10)
    out=(p.stdout+p.stderr).replace(os.environ.get('GITHUB_TOKEN','<none>'),'[redacted]')
    print(f'gh_auth_status_exit={p.returncode}')
    for line in out.splitlines()[:8]:
        if 'Token:' in line or 'oauth_token' in line.lower():
            print('[redacted token line]')
        else:
            print(line)
except Exception as e:
    print(f'gh_auth_status_error={type(e).__name__}: {e}')
PY
# Anonymous candidate PR probe for default repo from smoke doc.
python3 - <<'PY'
import json, urllib.request, urllib.error
repo='xbmc/kodiai'
url=f'https://api.github.com/repos/{repo}/pulls?state=open&per_page=5'
try:
    req=urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'Accept':'application/vnd.github+json','User-Agent':'kodiai-smoke-readiness'})
    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=20) as r:
        data=json.load(r)
    print(f'anonymous_pr_probe_repo={repo}')
    print(f'anonymous_pr_probe_count={len(data)}')
    for pr in data[:5]:
        print(f'candidate_pr=#{pr.get("number")} url={pr.get("html_url")} head={pr.get("head",{}).get("sha")} title={pr.get("title")!r}')
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
    print(f'anonymous_pr_probe_http_error={e.code}')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'anonymous_pr_probe_error={type(e).__name__}: {e}')
PY

command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, json, base64, urllib.parse
repo='xbmc/kodiai'
for path in ['kodiai.yml','.kodiai.yml','.github/kodiai.yml','biome.json','prettier.config.js','package.json','README.md']:
    endpoint=f'repos/{repo}/contents/{path}?ref=main'
    p=subprocess.run(['gh','api',endpoint,'--jq','{path:.path,sha:.sha,encoding:.encoding,content:.content}'],text=True,stdout=subprocess.PIPE,stderr=subprocess.PIPE,timeout=20)
    print(f'content_probe {path} exit={p.returncode}')
    if p.returncode==0 and p.stdout.strip():
        d=json.loads(p.stdout)
        text=base64.b64decode((d.get('content') or '').encode()).decode('utf-8','replace') if d.get('encoding')=='base64' else str(d)
        print('---begin '+path+'---')
        print('\n'.join(text.splitlines()[:60]))
        print('---end '+path+'---')
    elif p.stderr.strip():
        print('\n'.join(p.stderr.strip().splitlines()[:2]))
PY

python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, json, subprocess, sys, textwrap, time
from pathlib import Path
repo='xbmc/kodiai'
branch=f'smoke/m066-formatter-suggestions-{int(time.time())}'
base='main'

def gh(args, input_text=None):
    p=subprocess.run(['gh','api',*args], input=input_text, text=True, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE, timeout=60)
    if p.returncode != 0:
        print(f'gh_failed args={args} exit={p.returncode}', file=sys.stderr)
        print('\n'.join(p.stderr.splitlines()[:10]), file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(p.returncode)
    return p.stdout

def get_json(endpoint):
    return json.loads(gh([endpoint]))

def get_content(path, ref):
    d=get_json(f'repos/{repo}/contents/{path}?ref={ref}')
    return d, base64.b64decode(d['content']).decode('utf-8')

base_ref=get_json(f'repos/{repo}/git/ref/heads/{base}')
base_sha=base_ref['object']['sha']
# Create branch ref.
gh([f'repos/{repo}/git/refs','-X','POST','-f',f'ref=refs/heads/{branch}','-f',f'sha={base_sha}'])

config_meta, config_text=get_content('.kodiai.yml', branch)
if 'formatterSuggestions:' not in config_text:
    needle='  minConfidence: 70\n'
    replacement='  minConfidence: 70\n  formatterSuggestions:\n    automatic: false\n    command: "python3 scripts/m066-formatter-smoke.py"\n    maxSuggestions: 1\n'
    if needle not in config_text:
        raise SystemExit('expected minConfidence insertion point missing')
    config_text=config_text.replace(needle, replacement, 1)
else:
    raise SystemExit('formatterSuggestions unexpectedly already present')

script_text='''#!/usr/bin/env python3\n"""M066 controlled smoke formatter: fixes the intentional README double-space and emits a bounded diff."""\nfrom pathlib import Path\nimport subprocess\n\npath = Path("README.md")\ntext = path.read_text()\nformatted = text.replace("Kodiai  is", "Kodiai is", 1)\nif formatted != text:\n    path.write_text(formatted)\nsubprocess.run(["git", "diff", "--", "README.md"], check=False)\n'''

readme_meta, readme_text=get_content('README.md', branch)
if 'Kodiai is an installable GitHub App' not in readme_text:
    raise SystemExit('expected README smoke sentence missing')
readme_text=readme_text.replace('Kodiai is an installable GitHub App', 'Kodiai  is an installable GitHub App', 1)

updates=[
    ('.kodiai.yml', config_text, config_meta['sha'], 'M066 smoke: enable formatter suggestion command'),
    ('scripts/m066-formatter-smoke.py', script_text, None, 'M066 smoke: add bounded README formatter'),
    ('README.md', readme_text, readme_meta['sha'], 'M066 smoke: introduce controlled README whitespace hunk'),
]
for path, text, sha, message in updates:
    args=[f'repos/{repo}/contents/{path}','-X','PUT','-f',f'message={message}','-f',f'branch={branch}','-f',f'content={base64.b64encode(text.encode()).decode()}']
    if sha:
        args += ['-f',f'sha={sha}']
    gh(args)

head_ref=get_json(f'repos/{repo}/git/ref/heads/{branch}')
head_sha=head_ref['object']['sha']
body=textwrap.dedent(f'''\
M066 controlled formatter-suggestions smoke gate.\n\nThis PR intentionally contains one README whitespace-only hunk (`Kodiai  is` -> `Kodiai is`) plus the minimum PR-head smoke formatter configuration needed for `@kodiai format suggestions` to emit a same-PR suggestion.\n\nDo not merge; use only for M066 formatter-suggestions acceptance proof.\n\nNon-secret prerequisites captured by T02:\n- repo: `{repo}`\n- branch: `{branch}`\n- head SHA: `{head_sha}`\n- formatter command: `python3 scripts/m066-formatter-smoke.py`\n- controlled diff: README double-space correction\n''')
pr=json.loads(gh([f'repos/{repo}/pulls','-X','POST','-f','title=M066 formatter suggestions smoke gate','-f',f'head={branch}','-f',f'base={base}','-f',f'body={body}']))
print(json.dumps({
    'repo': repo,
    'branch': branch,
    'base': base,
    'base_sha': base_sha,
    'head_sha': head_sha,
    'pr_number': pr['number'],
    'pr_url': pr['html_url'],
    'controlled_diff': 'README.md one intentional double-space in first paragraph; formatter command fixes it back to single space',
    'auth_path': 'gh CLI authenticated as keithah with repo scope and admin/push/pull permissions on xbmc/kodiai',
    'formatter_config_source': 'PR head .kodiai.yml',
    'formatter_command': 'python3 scripts/m066-formatter-smoke.py'
}, indent=2))
PY
if command -v slog >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  slog write --action "create-pr" --tool "github-bot" --detail "Created M066 formatter suggestions smoke gate PR in xbmc/kodiai" --reason "Establish controlled PR prerequisites for M066/S06/T02" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
fi

python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, json, sys
repo='xbmc/kodiai'
pr=134
checks=[]
endpoints={
  'pr_metadata': f'repos/{repo}/pulls/{pr}',
  'pr_files': f'repos/{repo}/pulls/{pr}/files?per_page=100',
  'pr_reviews': f'repos/{repo}/pulls/{pr}/reviews?per_page=100',
  'issue_comments': f'repos/{repo}/issues/{pr}/comments?per_page=100',
  'review_comments': f'repos/{repo}/pulls/{pr}/comments?per_page=100',
}
for name, endpoint in endpoints.items():
    p=subprocess.run(['gh','api',endpoint],text=True,stdout=subprocess.PIPE,stderr=subprocess.PIPE,timeout=30)
    print(f'{name}_read_exit={p.returncode}')
    if p.returncode != 0:
        print('\n'.join(p.stderr.splitlines()[:3]))
        continue
    data=json.loads(p.stdout)
    if isinstance(data, list):
        print(f'{name}_count={len(data)}')
        if name == 'pr_files':
            for f in data:
                print(f'file={f.get("filename")} status={f.get("status")} additions={f.get("additions")} deletions={f.get("deletions")}')
    else:
        print(f'{name}_url={data.get("html_url")}')
        print(f'{name}_head_sha={data.get("head",{}).get("sha")}')
        print(f'{name}_head_ref={data.get("head",{}).get("ref")}')
        print(f'{name}_mergeable_state={data.get("mergeable_state")}')
print('log_correlation_target=Azure Container Apps ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL filtered by future delivery id or formatter reviewOutputKey, projecting RevisionName_s and bounded formatter status fields')

command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import re, sys
p=Path('docs/smoke/m066-formatter-suggestions.md')
text=p.read_text()
required=[
 'T02 credentialed smoke readiness',
 '`gh` CLI authenticated as `keithah`',
 '`xbmc/kodiai`',
 '`https://github.com/xbmc/kodiai/pull/134`',
 '`134`',
 '`smoke/m066-formatter-suggestions-1777950652`',
 '`df017da6b6959038a288f8eae070b7a384ef0fa4`',
 'one intentional double-space',
 'Azure Container Apps `ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL`',
 'pending T3',
]
# tolerate T03 literal instead of typo key
required[-1]='pending T03'
missing=[s for s in required if s not in text]
secret_patterns=[
    r'gh[pousr]_[A-Za-z0-9_]{20,}',
    r'github_pat_[A-Za-z0-9_]{20,}',
    r'-----BEGIN [A-Z ]*PRIVATE KEY-----',
]
leaks=[]
for pat in secret_patterns:
    if re.search(pat,text):
        leaks.append(pat)
print(f'readiness_required_fields_missing={len(missing)}')
for m in missing:
    print(f'missing={m}')
print(f'secret_pattern_matches={len(leaks)}')
if missing or leaks:
    sys.exit(1)
print('m066_t02_readiness_doc_ok')
PY
python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, json, sys
repo='xbmc/kodiai'; pr='134'
checks=[
 ('metadata', f'repos/{repo}/pulls/{pr}'),
 ('files', f'repos/{repo}/pulls/{pr}/files?per_page=100'),
 ('reviews', f'repos/{repo}/pulls/{pr}/reviews?per_page=100'),
 ('issue_comments', f'repos/{repo}/issues/{pr}/comments?per_page=100'),
 ('review_comments', f'repos/{repo}/pulls/{pr}/comments?per_page=100'),
]
fail=[]
for name, ep in checks:
    p=subprocess.run(['gh','api',ep],text=True,stdout=subprocess.PIPE,stderr=subprocess.PIPE,timeout=30)
    print(f'{name}_exit={p.returncode}')
    if p.returncode != 0:
        fail.append(name)
        continue
    data=json.loads(p.stdout)
    if name=='metadata':
        expected='df017da6b6959038a288f8eae070b7a384ef0fa4'
        actual=data.get('head',{}).get('sha')
        print(f'head_sha_matches={actual == expected}')
        if actual != expected: fail.append('head_sha')
    if name=='files':
        files={f.get('filename'):f for f in data}
        required={'.kodiai.yml','README.md','scripts/m066-formatter-smoke.py'}
        print('files_seen=' + ','.join(sorted(files)))
        if set(files) != required: fail.append('files')
if fail:
    print('failures=' + ','.join(fail))
    sys.exit(1)
print('m066_t02_github_read_write_path_ok')
PY

 'Status: **ready for authenticated T03 trigger on controlled PR #134; accepted live formatter-suggestion proof still not captured**.',

import subprocess, json, sys
repo='xbmc/kodiai'; pr='134'; expected='df017da6b6959038a288f8eae070b7a384ef0fa4'
checks=[('metadata',f'repos/{repo}/pulls/{pr}'),('files',f'repos/{repo}/pulls/{pr}/files?per_page=100'),('reviews',f'repos/{repo}/pulls/{pr}/reviews?per_page=100'),('issue_comments',f'repos/{repo}/issues/{pr}/comments?per_page=100'),('review_comments',f'repos/{repo}/pulls/{pr}/comments?per_page=100')]
fail=[]
for name, ep in checks:
    p=subprocess.run(['gh','api',ep],text=True,stdout=subprocess.PIPE,stderr=subprocess.PIPE,timeout=30)
    print(f'{name}_exit={p.returncode}')
    if p.returncode != 0: fail.append(name); continue
    data=json.loads(p.stdout)
    if name=='metadata' and data.get('head',{}).get('sha') != expected: fail.append('head_sha')
    if name=='files' and {f.get('filename') for f in data} != {'.kodiai.yml','README.md','scripts/m066-formatter-smoke.py'}: fail.append('files')
if fail:
    print('failures='+','.join(fail)); sys.exit(1)
print('m066_t02_github_read_write_path_ok')
